verdict: No LR in the grid clears the sec 1.31.1 demonstration bar (best mean acc_A=0.0320 at lr=0.001, bar=0.09375). Per FIX-5's own pre-stated branch: the separation strengthens to a two-baseline result (the transformer joins the vector-state ablation as a second baseline that fails to recall even after a 4-point LR search).
